fallback_manual_path_label: Manual local account creation via Settings > Identity; SCIM fallback via signed file import when OIDC issuer is unreachable.
local_artifact_safety_note: Provider metadata (issuer URL, tenant id) is tenant-scoped and cached locally as opaque refs. Local editing history and settings remain on the device regardless of provider state.

action_lineage.result_label: OIDC issuer registered and tenant binding established

plain_language_summary: Row 'harden-identity-admin:directory_provider_card' (class: directory_provider_card) qualifies stable: provisioning class declared, sync freshness explicit, local vs tenant scope named, action lineage present, raw secret material excluded.

fallback_manual_path_label: Manual user creation via admin console; seat transfer requires admin-signed request file when SCIM endpoint is stale.
local_artifact_safety_note: User directory state is tenant-scoped and synced from the SCIM source. Local project files, history, and personal settings remain local-only and are never modified by seat changes.

action_lineage.action_label: Transfer seat from user:0099 to user:0100
action_lineage.result_label: Seat transferred; local artifacts of user:0099 preserved on device

fallback_manual_path_label: Fallback to last-known-good signed provisioning snapshot; manual admin review required before re-enabling live SCIM sync.
local_artifact_safety_note: Failure is tenant-scoped (SCIM endpoint unreachable). Local editing remains fully available because local capabilities do not depend on the provisioning source.

action_lineage.result_label: Provider outage detected; fallback to cached snapshot activated

fallback_manual_path_label: Manual policy bundle import via admin console when automatic distribution is unavailable.
local_artifact_safety_note: Dry-run result is computed locally from the imported bundle. The policy bundle itself is tenant-scoped, but the dry-run engine runs locally and does not send local file contents to the tenant.

action_lineage.action_label: Evaluate policy bundle against current workspace
action_lineage.result_label: Two targets would be blocked; no local-only targets affected

fallback_manual_path_label: No external dependency required; local governance is enforced by the local policy engine using signed bundles or built-in defaults.
local_artifact_safety_note: All governance state for local-only mode is local_state_only. Tenant-scoped policy may augment but cannot override local-core continuity. Local artifacts are never subject to remote deletion or deprovisioning.

action_lineage.result_label: Local-core continuity enforced; no tenant connection required
